data.title: Still Life
data.description: Finding poetry in everyday objects. This ongoing series transforms ordinary items into contemplative compositions through careful arrangement, dramatic lighting, and a restrained color palette. Each image invites the viewer to pause and reconsider the beauty hidden in the mundane.

images.alt: Minimalist arrangement of dried flowers and ceramic vessels
Warm light falling across a stack of weathered books
Shadow play across a simple white tabletop arrangement
Close-up of textured fabric and natural materials
